title: Efficient Speech Language Modeling via Energy Distance in Continuous Latent Space
abstract: SLED models speech autoregressively in continuous latent space using a lightweight per-token generative module trained with generalized energy distance. By avoiding residual vector quantization and hierarchical residual-token prediction, SLED simplifies speech language modeling while preserving rich speech information and supporting streaming inference. Experiments on zero-shot and streaming speech synthesis show strong WER, competitive quality, and efficient per-step sampling.
publication_status: No formal conference or journal reference found as of 2026-06-06
